subject:
pg&e's testimony on financial issues associated with tra
 undercollection

emails.subject:
Re: FW: PG&E's Testimony on Financial Issues Associated with TRA
 Undercollection
emails.subject_base:
PG&E's Testimony on Financial Issues Associated with TRA
 Undercollection
emails.body: Re: FW: PG&E's Testimony on Financial Issues Associated with TRA Undercollection This testimony was provided by PG&E in response to TURN's motion to roll TRA balances into the TCBA. While useful for internal purposes, the testimony was struck from the proceeding. PG&E has said they will be filing a subsequent application to the Commission on their rate stabilization plan within the next week. I would expect to see this, or similar information, in that filing.
